name: TextField
description: Text fields let operators enter and edit text — a registration number, a driver's name, an odometer reading, a note. karoo-ui's TextField wraps MUI's <TextField> (which itself composes FormControl + InputLabel + Input/OutlinedInput/FilledInput + FormHelperText) and defaults size to 'small' plus normalises a convenience `readOnly` prop across MUI v9's two readOnly locations.
keyRule: Pick one `variant` ('outlined' | 'filled' | 'standard') and use it consistently across a form. In the Cartrack portal, outlined is the de facto default for forms; filled suits dense, settings-style lists. Always pass `label`.

variants.name: variant="outlined"
variants.whenToUse: Default for forms; clear field boundaries.

variants.name: variant="filled"
variants.whenToUse: Dense, settings-style lists; strong visual grouping.

variants.name: variant="standard"
variants.whenToUse: Rare in fleet-web; underline-only, minimal chrome.

variants.name: With adornments (slotProps.input.startAdornment/endAdornment)
variants.whenToUse: Search (leading magnifier + trailing clear), password (visibility toggle), units (trailing "km").

variants.name: select
variants.whenToUse: Set `select` + child <MenuItem>s to render a dropdown field instead of composing a separate Select.

variants.name: multiline
variants.whenToUse: Longer notes; grows with content up to `maxRows`/`minRows`.

anatomy.name: FormControl (root)
anatomy.description: wraps label, input, and helper text; carries error/disabled/required/fullWidth context.

anatomy.name: InputLabel
anatomy.description: floats above the value; stays visible once filled or focused.

anatomy.name: Input / OutlinedInput / FilledInput
anatomy.description: the actual editable surface, chosen by `variant`.

anatomy.name: FormHelperText
anatomy.description: helper or error message below the field, driven by `helperText` + `error`.

behaviors.name: Label float
behaviors.description: The label sits in the field when empty and floats up on focus or when a value is present (MUI's InputLabel shrink behaviour), so it never hides the content.

behaviors.name: Validation
behaviors.description: Set `error` + `helperText` together to flip the field into the error state and show a concise message; MUI wires aria-invalid/aria-describedby automatically.

behaviors.name: Read-only convenience prop
behaviors.description: karoo-ui's `readOnly` (reproduced here) sets readOnly on both slotProps.input and slotProps.htmlInput at once, since MUI v9 supports it in either place and Autocomplete's renderInput pattern only wires the htmlInput one — passing this prop keeps behaviour predictable regardless of which internal path a given MUI feature reads from.

behaviors.name: Disabled
behaviors.description: Dims the whole field and removes it from the tab order (standard MUI `disabled`).

states.treatment: Primary 2px border (outlined) or 2px underline (filled/standard); primary label. Use brand.primary.dark, not .main, for the line — see tokens.json's accessibility.knownIssues.
Error colour border/underline, label, and helper text (error + helperText props).
38% opacity; not focusable, removed from tab order.

specs.value: 'small' (karoo-ui override; MUI's own unoverridden default is 'medium')

props.name: label
props.description: Field label; not required by MUI's type but should always be set per the portal's accessibility convention.

props.name: value
props.description: The input's current value (controlled) — pair with onChange.

props.name: defaultValue
props.description: Initial value for an uncontrolled field.

props.name: onChange
props.description: Called on every input change.

props.name: variant
props.description: MUI's own default is 'outlined' (unoverridden by karoo-ui); outlined is the Cartrack portal's de facto default for forms.

props.name: size
props.description: karoo-ui overrides MUI's own 'medium' default to 'small' for the portal's form density.

props.name: helperText
props.description: Helper text below the field; typically replaced by an error message when `error` is true.

props.name: error
props.description: Flips the field into the error state (border/label/helper text colour); pair with a specific helperText message.

props.name: disabled
props.description: Dims the whole field and removes it from tab order.

props.name: readOnly
props.description: karoo-ui convenience prop (not on plain MUI TextField) — shows a value that can't be edited but can be copied; sets readOnly on both slotProps.input and slotProps.htmlInput internally.

props.name: required
props.description: Sets aria-required and appends the required-field indicator to the label.

props.name: type
props.description: Underlying <input> type ('text' | 'password' | 'search' | 'number' | ...); ignored when multiline is true.

props.name: multiline
props.description: Renders a <textarea> that grows with content instead of a single-line input.

props.name: rows
props.description: Fixed row count for a multiline field (mutually exclusive with minRows/maxRows auto-grow).

props.name: minRows
props.description: Minimum rows for an auto-growing multiline field.

props.name: maxRows
props.description: Maximum rows before an auto-growing multiline field scrolls.

props.name: select
props.description: Renders as a dropdown (composes MUI Select internally); pair with child <MenuItem>s.

props.name: slotProps
props.type: { input?: object; htmlInput?: object; inputLabel?: object; htmlInput?: object; formHelperText?: object; select?: object; }
props.description: MUI v9's slot-props API — the real way to pass adornments (input.startAdornment/endAdornment), native <input> attributes (htmlInput), etc. Replaces the deprecated InputProps/inputProps.

props.name: fullWidth
props.description: Stretches the field to the width of its container.

props.name: autoFocus
props.description: Focuses the field on mount.

doThis: Always show a label; keep it visible when filled.
Write specific, helpful error text ("Enter a value", not "Invalid") via helperText + error.
Use one field variant per form.
Use slotProps.input for adornments, not the deprecated InputProps.
dontDoThis: Don't use placeholder text as the only label.
Don't mix filled and outlined in the same form.
Don't rely on colour alone for errors — include helperText.
Don't reach for MUI's legacy InputProps/inputProps — this codebase is on MUI v9's slotProps.
accessibility: Every field has a programmatic <label> (via MUI's InputLabel + htmlFor wiring); errors are linked via aria-describedby and announced.
Required and invalid states use aria-required / aria-invalid, not colour alone.

related.name: DatePicker
related.why: Dates and times pick better than they type — DatePicker composes its own TextField internally via slotProps.textField

related.name: Slider
related.why: Approximate values within a visible range

related.name: Icon
related.why: Adornment icons come from the FontAwesome Icon wrapper, not a Material ligature
